caption: User Access Management
description: User Access Management events report management updates to a user's privileges.
name: user_access

3.caption: Assign Role
3.description: Assign a role to a user.

4.caption: Remove Role
4.description: Remove a role from a user.

iam_role.description: The role assigned to or removed from a user.

privileges.description: List of privileges assigned to a user.

resource.description: Resource that the privileges give access to.

resources.description: Resources that the privileges give access to.

user.description: User to which privileges were assigned.
